description.ko: 거울 같은 심해 염수면 위에서 살아 있는 반투명 막들이 숨 쉬며, 짙은 플랑크톤 안개 속으로 황금빛 액체 광채를 흘려보내는 고요한 유기적 흐름.
description.en: A serene underwater bloom where living translucent membranes breathe above a mirrorlike brine surface, releasing golden liquid light into dense plankton haze.

prompt: AURA-7 organic flow artwork, "The Bathypelagic Bloom Mirror": a deep underwater horizontal composition where a calm reflective brine surface lies like a soft living mirror beneath floating biomorphic bloom-forms. Each bloom is a translucent #7FB069 gelatin membrane with darker #2D5A3D vein shadows branching from its underside, slowly folding and unfolding as if breathing. Thin streams of #FFE66D bioluminescent liquid light slide across the brine surface, separate into luminous beads, then rise as curling glowing tendrils through a misty #E6F2E1 water column. The atmosphere is serene, slow, and weightless, filled with high-density plankton sparks, pearl microbubbles, soft green caustic shimmer, layered underwater haze, wet organic translucency, delicate internal glow, and gentle motion blur. No figures, no machinery, no rigid architecture; refined cinematic depth and detailed generative art.
